TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKWebpEncoderFrame extends System.ValueType

Docs.summary: Represents a single frame in an animated WebP sequence.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKBitmap bitmap, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The source bitmap whose pixels will be used for this frame.
The length of time this frame is displayed during animation playback.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from a bitmap.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKImage image, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The source image whose pixels will be used for this frame.
The length of time this frame is displayed during animation playback.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from an image.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKPixmap pixmap, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The source pixmap providing direct access to the frame's pixels.
The length of time this frame is displayed during animation playback.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from a pixmap.
Gets or sets the length of time this frame is displayed during animation playback.
Docs.value: A representing the frame display duration.

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the pixmap providing access to this frame's pixel data.
